text:
Sorry to hear that — the crash on the markets tab after reinstalling is frustrating, especially since it points to something beyond a simple reinstall fix.

Can you confirm which version of the Novig app you're running (visible in the App Store listing or your device's app settings), and share the exact error message or crash text if one appears? In the meantime, the web app may work as a workaround while we look into this on iOS.

I'm looping in engineering to investigate the crash on iPhone 14 / iOS 26.4. A human will follow up once we have more information.

Novig Support
